title: erigeron manshuricus
intro: Erigeron manshuricus, also known as Manshurian dandelion or Manchurian dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Erigeron manshuricus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in herbal supplements or topical applications.
